calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Reset For Jury Trial

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-27-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
Saul M. Ferster, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Gregory Bergman
Mark Renne, Esq. specially appearing for defendant Lowrie Longacre

After seeing Judge Pro Tem, parties informed the Court that this matter had settled. Terms of the settlement are as follows for premises located at 2013 Turk St., San Francisco, CA. 94115:

Parties stipulated for entry of judgment. Defendant Lowrie Longacre to pay back rent by certified check or cash by 5:00 p.m. on Oct. 1, 2004. Defendant Lowrie Longacre to pay attorney's fees and cost in the amount of $2,500.00 by 5:00 p.m. on October 8, 2004. If all the terms are complied with, plaintiff to dismiss this matter. Plaintiff agreed with withdraw habitual late notice. If non-compliance to the terms, plaintiff upon 24 hour telephone notice, will seek entry of judgment for possession and sums owing. No further stays will be granted.

Judge Robert L. Dondero, Clerks: D. Boffi/V. Mu Reporter J. Bryce, #3321 (206)

payments.description: FIRST FILING UD COMPLT LESS THAN 2,500
